evidences.content: Conclusion: Market participation is strong, which may help maintain the bullish trend in the short term. Order Book Analysis (Buy/Sell Walls) Sell Walls In the price range of 71,000 to 72,500 USDT: - 72,500 USDT: The highest sell level, with 330.23 BTC, represents significant resistance. Overcoming it will require considerable volume. - 72,000 USDT: With an amount of 1376.89 BTC, it is an important level that could be difficult to break. - Other Levels: Prices between 71,700 and 72,400 USDT also show moderate selling volumes. Conclusion: The areas of 72,000 and 72,500 USDT are key resistance zones for the price in the short term. Buy Walls In the price range of 69,400 to 70,900 USDT: [...] Final Summary The combination of technical analysis and the order book indicates a bullish trend, with significant resistances at 72,000 and 72,500 USDT and key supports between 69,400 and 70,000 USDT. Despite selling pressure at high levels, buying volume suggests that the market has enough support to maintain the bullish trend, with possible corrections in the short term. Projection: Consolidation or slight correction before attempting a new push towards higher levels. #Bitcoin! #Inversiones...
